description: Create an activated research participant intake form in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!) titled 'CARDIA Follow-Up Study - Participant Intake Form 2024' with strict field-level validation. The survey must include a 'Demographic Information' group with mandatory questions: 'email' (Short free text, email validation), 'age' (Numerical, 18-99), 'zipcode' (Short free text, 5-digit Regex), 'income' (Numerical, 0-10,000,000), and 'children' (Numerical, 0-30). Additionally, include a 'Contact Preferences' group with a mandatory 'contactmethod' (List (Radio) with options: Email, Phone, Text Message, Postal Mail) and an optional 'notes' (Long free text, max 500 characters).
